proposed_entries.title: Run agent-checkin.js before any non-trivial work in the FAMtastic repo
proposed_entries.body: Standing rule (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md): node scripts/agent-checkin.js --intent "<short>" before scaffolding new systems. Surfaces overlapping in-flight work to prevent the parallel-implementation problem.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: type 'rule' not in allowlist {vendor-fact, do-not-repeat, bug-pattern}

proposed_entries.title: agent-checkin keyword overlap is too coarse — flags merged branches as conflicts
proposed_entries.body: 2026-05-05 audit: agent-checkin --intent "Plan closeout mechanism" flagged 7 branches as overlap based on generic keyword presence (plan, script, schema). All 7 were merged or stale. Need per-branch staleness check (already-merged? abandoned?) before flagging.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: confidence >= 0.85 AND type 'bug-pattern' is in allowlist
